styleHint: expensive toxic nightclub noir — honey-gold light dripping through indigo darkness, snake scales and orchid petals, wet marble, gold chains, smoke curling under violet neon, cinematic and dangerous

keywords.imageryPrompt: a bouquet of white orchids offered by a shadowed hand, thorns hidden among the stems
an emerald-and-gold serpent winding between champagne glasses on wet marble
a beautiful angel silhouette with one broken wing under violet neon
an elegant figure with subtle horns in a mirrored VIP booth, face in shadow
molten gold dripping slowly over black velvet
a staircase of warm light ascending into indigo smoke
a nightclub corridor engulfed in slow violet flame, dancing silhouettes
a crystal decanter of luminous green-gold liquid, one drop falling
thick honey dripping from a golden spoon into darkness
an empty chair at a lavish dinner table, a spilled glass of red wine
golden tree roots gripping cracked black marble, glowing veins
